nasb.text: They gave these cities which are here mentioned by name from the tribe of the sons of Judah and from the tribe of the sons of Simeon;

esv.text: Out of the tribe of the people of Judah and the tribe of the people of Simeon they gave the following cities mentioned by name,

cnv.text: 他們從猶大支派和西緬支派中，把以下這些有提名的城分了
